evals.prompt: Use the wordpress-plugin-developer-pro skill for a representative user request.
evals.expected_output: The response follows the skill workflow and states important assumptions.

evals.prompt: Handle an incomplete request that might need the wordpress-plugin-developer-pro skill.
evals.expected_output: The response asks only necessary clarifying questions or chooses a documented conservative default.

evals.prompt: Handle an edge case for the wordpress-plugin-developer-pro skill without over-triggering unrelated workflows.
evals.expected_output: The response handles edge cases according to the skill and avoids unsupported assumptions.

should_not_trigger: Answer a general question unrelated to this skill.
